channel.title: Firstwater Blog
channel.description: Writing on sound, sessions, and what people put down in them. From Daniel, also known as Firstwater.

item.title: I'm not a skeptic, and I'm not a believer
item.description: A Denver music producer on whether sound healing works: which claims are false, what the real science says, and why the hour can still be worth having.

item.title: Isolated together
item.description: A group sound bath and the same sound alone at home are different practices. A Denver facilitator on what most sound baths miss about the group, and what changes when people practice side by side.
